name: Olmuksan International Paper Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Olmuksan International Paper Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells various corrugated boxes and other custom manufacturing goods in Turkey and internationally. It provides fruit and vegetable, transport, shelf-ready, heavy-duty, meat, poultry, seafood, and e-commerce packaging products to food, agricultural, and other industrial sectors. The company was formerly known as Olmuksa International Paper - Sabanci Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Olmuksan International Paper Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. in March 2013. Olmuksan International Paper Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Olmuksan International Paper Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of International Paper Company.
